tests.scenario: Pricing information is displayed on the main screen
steps: Launch the app and navigate to the main screen
Verify that the main screen is fully loaded and displayed
Check the main screen for a section or table listing all subscription plans with their corresponding prices
tests.expected_result: The pricing information for all subscription plans is visible, clearly listed, and easily readable on the main screen

tests.scenario: Pricing information is displayed before login or signup actions
steps: Launch the app and navigate to the main screen
Verify that the login and signup buttons or links are visible on the main screen
Check that the pricing information for all subscription plans is displayed above or alongside the login and signup options
tests.expected_result: The pricing information for all subscription plans is displayed prominently on the main screen, before the user can access the login or signup functionality

tests.scenario: New User Free Trial Period Validation
steps: Create a new user account on the app.
Complete the onboarding process as a new user.
Verify that all premium features are accessible immediately after onboarding.
Wait for 7 days from the start of the onboarding process.
Verify that the user still has access to all premium features after 7 days.
tests.expected_result: The user has access to all premium features for at least 7 days without requiring a subscription.

tests.scenario: Free Trial Expiration Validation
steps: Create a new user account on the app.
Complete the onboarding process as a new user.
Verify that all premium features are accessible immediately after onboarding.
Wait for 8 days from the start of the onboarding process.
Verify that the user is prompted to subscribe to access premium features.
tests.expected_result: After 8 days, the user is no longer able to access premium features without a subscription.

tests.scenario: Successful Login from Second Device
steps: Create a new user account and verify it is active.
Log in to the system from a first device using the created account credentials.
Verify the user account information is displayed correctly on the first device.
Log in to the system from a second device using the same account credentials.
Verify the user account information is displayed correctly on the second device.
tests.expected_result: The system successfully authenticates the user on both devices and displays their account information without error.

tests.scenario: Multiple Device Login with Concurrent Sessions
steps: Create a new user account and verify it is active.
Log in to the system from a first device using the created account credentials.
Log in to the system from a second device using the same account credentials.
Perform actions on the first device that require account information.
Verify the account information on the first device remains up-to-date and accurate.
Perform actions on the second device that require account information.
Verify the account information on the second device remains up-to-date and accurate.
tests.expected_result: The system maintains concurrent sessions across multiple devices, ensuring both devices have access to the user's account information in real-time without error.

tests.scenario: Unexpected App Closure with Unsaved Data
steps: Launch the app and navigate to a session where data can be entered.
Enter some data into the session (e.g., text, numbers).
Simulate an unexpected app closure (e.g., force close, crash).
Reopen the app.
tests.expected_result: The app recovers and displays the unsaved data entered before the unexpected closure.

tests.scenario: App Closure During Data Entry Without Saving
steps: Launch the app and start a new session.
Enter data into the session but do not save it.
Simulate an unexpected shutdown or technical failure (e.g., device shutdown, app crash).
Restart the device and reopen the app.
tests.expected_result: Upon reopening, the app successfully recovers and displays the unsaved data that was entered before the app closed unexpectedly.

tests.scenario: Daily Motivational Quote Displayed on Home Screen on a Scheduled Day
steps: Open the app on a day when a motivational quote is scheduled (e.g., Monday)
Navigate to the home screen
Verify the home screen is fully loaded
tests.expected_result: The system displays a daily motivational quote with a visually appealing design on the home screen

tests.scenario: No Daily Motivational Quote on Non-Scheduled Day or If Feature is Disabled
steps: Open the app on a day when no motivational quote is scheduled (e.g., a day with no quote assigned)
Navigate to the home screen
Verify the home screen is fully loaded
tests.expected_result: The system does not display a daily motivational quote on the home screen or displays a message indicating that no quote is available for the day

tests.scenario: Reminder Notification at Selected Time
steps: Set the user-selected reminder time to 10:00 AM
Simulate the current time to be 10:00 AM
Verify the user has a pending notification
tests.expected_result: The system sends a notification to the user with a message prompting them to check in with their mental well-being at 10:00 AM

tests.scenario: No Reminder Notification if Time Not Matched
steps: Set the user-selected reminder time to 10:00 AM
Simulate the current time to be 9:59 AM
Verify the user has no pending notifications
tests.expected_result: The system does not send a notification to the user at 9:59 AM

tests.scenario: Valid Reminder Time Notification
steps: Set the current system time to 10:00 AM
Log in as a user and set a reminder for 10:05 AM to track their mood
Wait until the system time reaches 10:05 AM
Verify the user receives a notification to track their mood
tests.expected_result: The user receives a notification at 10:05 AM to track their mood

tests.scenario: Reminder Time Notification When User is Not Logged In
steps: Log in as a user and set a reminder for 11:00 AM to track their mood
Log out of the system
Wait until the system time reaches 11:00 AM
Verify the user receives a notification to track their mood
tests.expected_result: The user receives a notification at 11:00 AM to track their mood even when they are not logged in

tests.scenario: Export Mood History with Existing Data
steps: Log in as an existing user
Navigate to the mood history section
Ensure the user has saved mood history data
Request to export mood history as a file
Verify the system generates a file containing the user's mood history
tests.expected_result: A file is downloaded containing the user's mood history data in a readable format.

tests.scenario: Export Mood History with No Saved Data
steps: Log in as an existing user
Navigate to the mood history section
Ensure the user has no saved mood history data
Request to export mood history as a file
tests.expected_result: The system displays a message indicating that there is no mood history data to export.

tests.scenario: Valid Data Export
steps: Log in to the system with valid credentials
Navigate to the account settings page
Verify the 'Export Mental Health Data' option is available
Select the 'Export Mental Health Data' option
Verify the system generates a CSV file containing the user's mental health data
tests.expected_result: A CSV file is downloaded containing the user's mental health data.

tests.scenario: Unauthorized Access
steps: Log out of the system
Attempt to navigate to the account settings page
Verify the 'Export Mental Health Data' option is not available
Try to access the export option directly via URL or API call
tests.expected_result: The system prevents access to the account settings and export option, displaying an error message or redirecting to the login page.

tests.scenario: Valid Data Sharing with Anonymization
steps: Configure a third-party service for data sharing
Opt-in to share user data with the third-party service
Send a sample user data packet to the third-party service
Verify the data packet received by the third-party service
tests.expected_result: The received data packet does not contain any personally identifiable information and is in an anonymized format.

tests.scenario: Data Sharing without Opt-in
steps: Configure a third-party service for data sharing
Do not opt-in to share user data with the third-party service
Attempt to send a sample user data packet to the third-party service
Verify the data packet received by the third-party service, if any
tests.expected_result: No data packet is sent to the third-party service or the data packet does not contain any user data.
